scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.deploy:netlify: npm run build -w client && npx netlify-cli deploy --prod --no-build --dir=client/dist --filter @clientspace/client
scripts.deploy:netlify:draft: npm run build -w client && npx netlify-cli deploy --no-build --dir=client/dist --filter @clientspace/client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
